title: 211INFO DCM LINE - 211info
text: 211INFO 211INFO DCM LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon Department of Human Services (ODHS), in partnership with 211info, assists with disaster-related immediate or long-term recovery housing, shelter, food, and other needs for community members impacted by Oregon wildfires and other large scale disasters. 211info provides intake and referral for the program. Eligibility: Varies by service. Mainly serves people impacted by natural disasters that took place in Oregon and who are in need of recovery-related assistance. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone 211 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake. Information will be documented and submitted confidentially to ODHS and ODHS will follow up with the caller as soon as possible. Voicemail option if specialists are unavailable. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of loss of disaster may be required LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disaster Related Case Management Post Disaster Cleanup Post Disaster Food Services Post Disaster Housing Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - SEVERE WINTER WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER AND SEVERE WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY FOOD - 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY FOR FAMILIES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY EVICTION PREVENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY FAMILY SHELTER WAITLIST INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO CHILD CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO COORDINATION CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO ICE IMPACT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO OUTREACH AND MATERIALS REQUESTS INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE DEPARTMENT INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HIV/STD HOTLINE MONEY MANAGEMENT - 211INFO FINANCIAL WELLNESS UTILITIES - 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
